article.title: Alienware AW2726DM 27-inch QHD 240 Hz QD-OLED gaming monitor review: A price breakthrough for desktop OLED
article.summary: Alienware smashes price barriers with the AW2726DM. It’s a 27-inch QHD QD-OLED with 240 Hz, Adaptive-Sync, HDR10, and wide gamut color with an opening price of just $350.
article.title_zh: Alienware AW2726DM 27 英寸 QHD 240 Hz QD-OLED 電競顯示器評測：桌面 OLED 的價格突破
article.summary_zh: Alienware 以 AW2726DM 打破價格障礙，這是一款 27 英寸 QHD QD-OLED 顯示器，具有 240 Hz、Adaptive-Sync、HDR10 和廣色域，起價僅為 $350。

article.title: Macron Leads EU Push to Coordinate Social Media Bans for Minors
article.summary: French President Emmanuel Macron and a group of European Union leaders pushing to restrict social media use among minors are set to meet remotely on Thursday to coordinate their efforts.
article.title_zh: 馬克宏領導歐盟推動協調未成年人社交媒體禁令
article.summary_zh: 法國總統埃馬紐埃爾·馬克宏和一組推動限制未成年人使用社交媒體的歐盟領導人定於週四舉行遠程會議，協調各自的努力。

article.title: With Amazon’s latest acquisition, Starlink may soon have a real competitor on its hands
article.summary: Credit: Edgar Cervantes / Android Authority TL;DR Amazon has announced plans to merge its Amazon LEO satellite service with Globalstar to bring direct-to-device satellite services to mobile devices. Amazon LEO is expected to begin limited LEO internet access this year, though its D2D services aren’t expected until 2028. Amazon has a long way to go if it wants to outdo Starlink, but it’s good to see more competition in the LEO satellite game. For years, Amazon has promised it would eventually offer its own low-Earth orbit satellite service capable of going head-to-head with Starlink. It’s been an extremely slow road for Amazon’s Project Kuiper, but it looks like momentum is finally picking up. Earlier today, the company announced its satellite service will debut under the name Amazon Leo an
article.title_zh: 隨著 Amazon 的最新收購，Starlink 可能很快面臨真正的競爭對手
article.summary_zh: Amazon 宣布計劃將其 Amazon LEO 衛星服務與 Globalstar 合併，為行動設備提供直連衛星服務。

article.title: Telegram Is Still Hosting a Sanctioned $21 Billion Crypto Scammer Black Market
article.summary: The UK designated Xinbi Guarantee as an enabler of crypto scammers and human trafficking weeks ago. Telegram is still hosting it in plain sight.
article.title_zh: Telegram 仍在公然託管被制裁的 210 億美元加密貨幣詐騙黑市
article.summary_zh: 英國數週前將 Xinbi Guarantee 列為加密貨幣詐騙和人口販賣的幫助者，但 Telegram 仍在明目張膽地託管該平台。

article.title: Iran Looking For Every Way To Evade Sanctions: Redbord
article.summary: Ari Redbord, global head of policy and government affairs at TRM Labs, joins Scarlet Fu and Tim Stenovec on "Bloomberg Crypto." As a fragile US-Iran ceasefire takes shape, Tehran has signaled that payments in digital currency should form part of any toll system for vessels passing through the Strait of Hormuz, the chokepoint through which around a fifth of the world’s oil normally flows. The logic is clear: tokens cannot be easily confiscated under sanctions. (Source: Bloomberg)
article.title_zh: 伊朗尋求各種規避制裁的方式：Redbord
article.summary_zh: TRM Labs 全球政策和政府事務主管 Ari Redbord 在『Bloomberg Crypto』節目中發言，隨著脆弱的美伊停火成形，德黑蘭表示數位貨幣支付應成為任何船隻通過霍爾木茲海峽的收費系統的一部分。

article.title: Bessent Calls Anthropic’s Mythos a Breakthrough in China AI Race
article.summary: US Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent hailed Anthropic PBC’s Mythos as a revolutionary step that will keep America ahead of China in AI, endorsing an industry leader that’s clashed with Washington over its role in military endeavors.
article.title_zh: Bessent 稱 Anthropic 的 Mythos 是中美 AI 競賽中的突破性進展
article.summary_zh: 美國財政部長 Scott Bessent 稱讚 Anthropic PBC 的 Mythos 是革命性的一步，將保持美國在 AI 領域領先中國的地位，力挺這家曾因軍事用途問題與華盛頓發生衝突的業界領袖。

article.title: The US just made an exception to its sweeping Wi-Fi router ban, and it’s a big one
article.summary: Credit: Netgear TL;DR The FCC has started granting conditional approvals to certain Wi-Fi routers, allowing them to launch in the US market without posing security risks. Netgear is among the first to receive this approval, with its routers cleared for sale in the US at least until next year. The broader policy isn’t changing, meaning that new Wi-Fi routers launching in the US must pass a national security review before entering the market. In March 2026, the FCC announced that all new foreign-made Wi-Fi routers will be blocked from getting approval to launch in the US market unless they pass strict government checks. Now, the regulatory body is easing that sweeping crackdown for some companies, granting its first “conditional approval” to select routers.
article.title_zh: 美國對全面 Wi-Fi 路由器禁令做出重大例外
article.summary_zh: FCC 已開始向某些 Wi-Fi 路由器授予條件批准，允許它們在美國市場上推出而不會構成安全風險，Netgear 是首批獲得批准的廠商之一。

article.title: EU Unveils Age Verification App as Social Media Bans Gain Steam
article.summary: The European Union has unveiled an app to confirm users’ age online, setting the standard for verification technology as more countries consider laws banning young teenagers from social media.
article.title_zh: 歐盟推出年齡驗證應用程式，社群媒體禁令勢頭增強
article.summary_zh: 歐盟推出應用程式以驗證用戶年齡，為驗證技術設定標準，因為越來越多國家考慮禁止青少年使用社群媒體。

article.title: Netgear secures conditional approval from the FCC following router ban — company can continue importing foreign-made routers through October 2027
article.summary: Netgear secured a conditional approval from the FCC to continue releasing new models of several router lines, with the company saying in its SEC disclosure that it can launch new models indefinitely provided it can maintain its approval.
article.title_zh: Netgear 獲得 FCC 條件批准，路由器禁令後可繼續進口——公司可持續引進外製路由器至 2027 年 10 月
article.summary_zh: Netgear 獲得 FCC 條件批准，可繼續推出多條路由器產品線的新款型號，公司在 SEC 文件中表示只要維持批准資格即可無限期推出新產品。

article.title: AI-Exposed Lenders Show Early Credit Warning Signs, Moody’s Says
article.summary: Artificial intelligence is becoming a bigger fault line in credit markets, according to a Moody’s Analytics report that points to emerging signs of broader strain among exposed lenders.
article.title_zh: 穆迪稱 AI 風險敞口的貸款機構顯示早期信用警告信號
article.summary_zh: 根據穆迪分析公司的報告，人工智慧正在成為信貸市場更大的分歧點，並指出風險敞口貸款機構出現了更廣泛的壓力跡象。

article.title: Anthropic's Claude Mythos might be the best overall AI model for cybersecurity, but cheaper models can attain similar results, research shows — cross-examination of the frontier model raises questions on uptime and reliability
article.summary: Anthropic's Mythos might be the best cybersecurity AI ever, but it's not the only one and it may well be the most expensive, raising questions about how useful it actually is, when weighed against the competition.
article.title_zh: Anthropic 的 Claude Mythos 可能是網路安全領域最好的 AI 模型，但研究顯示較便宜的模型可達到類似效果——對前沿模型的深入檢驗引發了關於正常運行時間和可靠性的疑問
article.summary_zh: Anthropic 的 Mythos 可能是最好的網路安全 AI，但它並非唯一選擇，且可能是最昂貴的，這引發了對其相對於競爭對手的實際效用的質疑。

article.title: Anthropic’s redesigned Claude Code desktop app lets you burn through tokens even faster
article.summary: You’d think one major update to Claude Code would be enough for one day, but on Tuesday, Anthropic didn’t just launch routines for Claude Code but also a redesigned desktop experience for its coding agents — with a few small tweaks to the overall app , too. As Anthropic describes it, “The new app is built for how agentic coding actually feels now: many things in flight, and you in the orchestrator seat.” This means you can now see all the active and recent sessions more easily, putting the emphasis on managing agents as they work on multiple repos and across them. And for when you need to ask a question while the agent is working, you can now open a side chat that knows about the main context, but doesn’t redirect the agent while it is working (you can s
article.title_zh: Anthropic 重新設計的 Claude Code 桌面應用讓你更快速地消耗代幣
article.summary_zh: Anthropic 在週二不僅為 Claude Code 推出了例程功能，還發布了重新設計的桌面體驗，並對整個應用進行了一些小調整。

article.title: How to Plan Agentic AI Deployment for Chip Design
article.summary: AI in semiconductor design has moved beyond experimentation—it’s the new status quo. What began as a series of isolated use cases, such as placement optimization and simulation triage, has now crossed a
article.title_zh: 如何為芯片設計規劃 Agentic AI 部署
article.summary_zh: 半導體設計中的 AI 已超越實驗階段，成為新常態。

article.title: Spring creator wants Java’s type system to tame agentic AI
article.summary: Rod Johnson , the creator of the Spring Framework , is back with another open source project — and this time he’s aiming to solve what he sees as the central problem of enterprise AI: Making large language model-driven applications predictable enough to actually run a business on. Johnson showcased Embabel , an agentic AI framework for Java , during a live demo last week at Microsoft’s JDConf developer conference. The framework is Apache-licensed, hosted on GitHub, and built on top of Spring Boot . This means that Java developers already familiar with the enterprise Java-based Spring ecosystem should find the on-ramp short. Johnson’s goal with Embabel is to show that Java is just as good, if not better, for agentic systems — particularly enterprise systems &md
article.title_zh: Spring 創建者希望用 Java 的類型系統來馴服智能代理 AI
article.summary_zh: Spring Framework 創建者 Rod Johnson 推出新的開源項目，旨在解決企業 AI 的核心問題：使大語言模型驅動的應用程序足夠可預測，以便在實際業務中運行。

article.title: Google app with AI Mode is now available for Windows worldwide
article.summary: Back in September of last year, Google launched an experimental Windows app with AI Mode built-in. Now, this has been made available to everyone across the globe, but only in English for now. Undoubtedly more languages are going to be supported soon. The Google app for Windows lets you use Alt+Space as a shortcut to bring it up in a small window and ask it anything. That shortcut will be very familiar to you if you're a Mac user, of course, since it's what brings up Spotlight search. Google's app obviously provides a Google search box, but it's so much more - you can...
article.title_zh: 具有 AI Mode 的 Google 應用現已在全球 Windows 上推出
article.summary_zh: Google 去年 9 月推出的實驗性 Windows 應用現已向全球所有用戶開放，目前僅支持英文。

article.title: 36M Xfinity customers had their data exposed – here’s how to claim your payout
article.summary: Back in 2023, hackers accessed the personal data of 36 million Xfinity customers. Comcast said at the time that the data exposed included names, contact details, and dates of birth. A class action lawsuit followed, and a $117.5 million settlement has now been reached … more…
article.title_zh: 360 萬 Xfinity 用戶資料外洩 - 如何申請賠償
article.summary_zh: 2023 年駭客入侵 3,600 萬 Xfinity 用戶的個人資料，包括姓名、聯絡方式和出生日期。隨後的集體訴訟已達成 1.175 億美元的和解。

article.title: Google brings back Pixel Referral Program: 10% off phones, $50 Store credit
article.summary: After the last round that started with the Pixel 10 launch ended in February, the Pixel Referral Program is back. more…
article.title_zh: Google 重新推出 Pixel 推薦計劃：手機享 10% 優惠，獲得 $50 商店信用
article.summary_zh: Pixel 推薦計劃在 Pixel 10 發布開始的上一輪於二月結束後回歸。

article.title: Apple @ Work Podcast: PocketMDM brings Apple Business Manager to your pocket
article.summary: Apple @ Work is exclusively brought to you by Mosyle , the only Apple Unified Platform. Mosyle is the only solution that integrates in a single professional-grade platform all the solutions necessary to seamlessly and automatically deploy, manage & protect Apple devices at work. Over 45,000 organizations trust Mosyle to make millions of Apple devices work-ready with no effort and at an affordable cost. Request your EXTENDED TRIAL today and understand why Mosyle is everything you need to work with Apple . In this episode of Apple @ Work, Joshua Patrick joins the show to talk about his new app: PocketMDM . more…
article.title_zh: Apple @ Work Podcast：PocketMDM 將 Apple Business Manager 帶到您的口袋
article.summary_zh: Apple @ Work 由 Mosyle Apple Unified Platform 獨家贊助。Mosyle 是唯一將所有必要解決方案整合在單一專業級平台上的方案，可無縫自動部署、管理及保護企業 Apple 裝置。

article.title: Does AT&T really think customers will pay over $100 for rumored Elite plan?
article.summary: Credit: Edgar Cervantes / Android Authority TL;DR A new AT&T plan has leaked, dubbed Elite 2.0. No word on when AT&T plans to actually launch it. The new plan gives you 250GB hotspot access, 20GB international data, and a few other extras. Pricing is crazy high, with four lines costing $75 each. Single-line pricing isn’t confirmed, but is likely around $105-$110 per month. Last month, AT&T introduced three new core plans and a new OneConnect plan that combines home internet with mobile service . It seems it’s not done making changes just yet, as a new leak from Sneed Mobile Tech suggests that an even more expensive Elite 2.0 plan is on its way soon. Don’t want to miss the best from Android Authority ?
article.title_zh: AT&T 真的認為客戶會為傳聞中的 Elite 計劃支付超過 $100 嗎？
article.summary_zh: 一項新的 AT&T 計劃洩露，名為 Elite 2.0，提供 250GB 熱點訪問、20GB 國際數據和其他額外功能。定價非常高，四條線路每月需支付 $75。

article.title: YouTube Music rolls out split-view Now Playing redesign on Android, iOS
article.summary: The split-view Now Playing redesign that YouTube Music has been working on since last year is now widely rolling out. more…
article.title_zh: YouTube Music 在 Android 和 iOS 上推出分割視圖 Now Playing 重新設計
article.summary_zh: YouTube Music 去年開始開發的分割視圖 Now Playing 重新設計現已廣泛推出。
